25.reason: The condition `(top>0)` is always true when there are characters in W, causing words to be processed incorrectly when encountering non-space delimiters like punctuation or newline. Should check for word delimiters (non-letter characters) and only process when top>0.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The condition `(top>0)` is always true when there are characters in W, causing words to be processed incorrectly when encountering non-space delimiters like punctuation or newline. Should check for word delimiters (non-letter characters) and only process when top>0.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  The condition `(top>0)` is always true when there are characters in W, causing premature word termination on non-space, non-letter characters (e.g., punctuation, newline). Should check for word boundary only when a non-letter character is encountered and top>0.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: This condition processes an empty word when top==0 and char is space, causing an empty string to be inserted. It should be `else if(top>0)` only.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This condition incorrectly triggers an empty word when a space appears with top==0. It should only process a word when top>0.
